tuple_v0.doc: A registered admin (ed25519) submitting the transaction.\nThe tuple is `(public_key, signature)` where the signature covers the Soroban payload.
tuple_v0.name: Admin

udt_struct_v0.doc:
Authentication data for DVN contract transactions.

This struct is used with Soroban's custom account interface to authorize
transactions through a combination of admin signature and multisig quorum.
udt_struct_v0.name: TransactionAuthData

fields.doc: Expiration timestamp (ledger time) after which this auth is invalid.
fields.name: expiration

fields.doc: Entity submitting the transaction (admin, or permissionless).
fields.name: sender

fields.doc: Signatures from multisig signers (secp256k1, 65 bytes each).
fields.name: signatures

fields.doc: Verifier ID - must match the DVN's configured VID.
fields.name: vid

udt_struct_v0.doc: Configuration for a destination chain.\n\nContains fee calculation parameters specific to each destination endpoint.
udt_struct_v0.name: DstConfig

fields.doc: Minimum fee margin in USD (scaled by native decimals rate).
fields.name: floor_margin_usd

fields.doc: Gas for verification on the destination chain.
fields.name: gas

fields.doc: Fee multiplier in basis points (10000 = 100%).\nIf 0, the default multiplier from worker config is used.
fields.name: multiplier_bps

udt_struct_v0.doc: Parameter for setting destination chain configuration.
udt_struct_v0.name: DstConfigParam

fields.doc: The configuration for this destination.
fields.name: config

fields.doc: The destination endpoint ID.
fields.name: dst_eid

udt_struct_v0.doc: Represents a single contract invocation for multisig authorization.\n\nUsed in `hash_call_data` to compute the hash that signers sign over.
udt_struct_v0.name: Call

fields.doc: Function arguments.
fields.name: args

fields.doc: Function name to invoke.
fields.name: func

fields.doc: Target contract address.
fields.name: to

function_v0.doc: Validates authorization for DVN contract operations.
function_v0.name: __check_auth

function_v0.doc:
Sets the paused state of the worker.

When paused, the worker will reject new job assignments (e.g., assign_job, get_fee).
Existing jobs in progress are not affected.

# Arguments
* `paused` - `true` to pause, `false` to unpause
function_v0.name: set_paused

function_v0.doc:
Sets admin status for an address.

Admins can configure worker settings like fee multipliers, deposit addresses,
and supported option types.

**Address type requirement:** Admins used for execute/compose flows (Executor)
or custom account auth (DVN) must be Ed25519 accounts. Contract-type addresses
cannot participate in custom account authorization. Only Ed25519 account
addresses can sign for execute/compose and DVN admin operations. Contract-type
admins are not supported for these flows;

# Arguments
* `admin` - The address to set admin status for
* `active` - `true` to add admin, `false` to remove
function_v0.name: set_admin

function_v0.doc:
Sets whether a message library is supported by this worker.

Message libraries (e.g., ULN302) call workers to assign jobs. Only supported
libraries can interact with this worker.

# Arguments
* `message_lib` - The message library contract address
* `supported` - `true` to add support, `false` to remove support
function_v0.name: set_supported_message_lib

function_v0.doc:
Sets allowlist status for an OApp address.

When the allowlist is empty, all OApps are allowed (unless on denylist).
When the allowlist is not empty, only allowlisted OApps are allowed.
Denylist always takes precedence over allowlist.

# Arguments
* `oapp` - The OApp contract address
* `allowed` - `true` to add to allowlist, `false` to remove
function_v0.name: set_allowlist

function_v0.doc:
Sets denylist status for an OApp address.

Denylisted OApps are blocked from using this worker, even if they're on
the allowlist (denylist takes precedence).

# Arguments
* `oapp` - The OApp contract address
* `denied` - `true` to add to denylist, `false` to remove
function_v0.name: set_denylist

function_v0.doc:
Sets the default fee multiplier in basis points.

The multiplier is applied to base fees during fee calculation. Used when
no destination-specific multiplier is configured.

# Arguments
* `admin` - Admin address (must provide authorization)
* `multiplier_bps` - Multiplier in basis points (10000 = 1x, 12000 = 1.2x)
function_v0.name: set_default_multiplier_bps

function_v0.doc:
Sets the deposit address where worker fees are collected.

When jobs are assigned, fees are directed to this address.

# Arguments
* `admin` - Admin address (must provide authorization)
* `deposit_address` - Address to receive collected fees
function_v0.name: set_deposit_address

function_v0.doc:
Sets supported executor option types for a destination endpoint.

# Arguments
* `admin` - Admin address (must provide authorization)
* `eid` - Destination endpoint ID (chain identifier)
* `option_types` - Supported option types. Each byte represents an option type.
function_v0.name: set_supported_option_types

function_v0.doc:
Sets the worker fee library contract address.

The fee library calculates fees based on executor options and price feed data.

# Arguments
* `admin` - Admin address (must provide authorization)
* `worker_fee_lib` - Fee library contract address implementing `IExecutorFeeLib`
function_v0.name: set_worker_fee_lib

function_v0.doc:
Sets the price feed contract address.

The price feed provides gas prices and exchange rates for cross-chain
fee calculations.

# Arguments
* `admin` - Admin address (must provide authorization)
* `price_feed` - Price feed contract address implementing `ILayerZeroPriceFeed`
function_v0.name: set_price_feed

function_v0.doc: Returns whether the worker is paused.
function_v0.name: paused

function_v0.doc:
Returns whether an address is an admin.

# Arguments
* `admin` - The address to check
function_v0.name: is_admin

function_v0.doc: Returns all admin addresses.
function_v0.name: admins

function_v0.doc:
Returns whether a message library is supported.

# Arguments
* `message_lib` - Message library contract address
function_v0.name: is_supported_message_lib

function_v0.doc:
Returns all supported message library addresses.

# Returns
Vector of supported message library contract addresses.
function_v0.name: message_libs

function_v0.doc:
Returns whether an OApp is on the allowlist.

# Arguments
* `oapp` - OApp contract address
function_v0.name: is_on_allowlist

function_v0.doc: Returns the number of addresses on the allowlist.
function_v0.name: allowlist_size

function_v0.doc:
Returns whether an OApp is on the denylist.

# Arguments
* `oapp` - OApp contract address
function_v0.name: is_on_denylist

function_v0.doc:
Returns whether an OApp has access control list (ACL) permission.

ACL evaluation order:
1. If on denylist \xe2\x86\x92 denied
2. If allowlist is empty OR on allowlist \xe2\x86\x92 allowed
3. Otherwise \xe2\x86\x92 denied

# Arguments
* `oapp` - OApp contract address to check
function_v0.name: has_acl

function_v0.doc: Returns the default fee multiplier in basis points.
function_v0.name: default_multiplier_bps

function_v0.doc: Returns the deposit address where fees are collected.
function_v0.name: deposit_address

function_v0.doc:
Returns supported option types for a destination endpoint.

# Arguments
* `eid` - Destination endpoint ID (chain identifier)
function_v0.name: get_supported_option_types

function_v0.doc: Returns the worker fee library contract address.
function_v0.name: worker_fee_lib

function_v0.doc: Returns the price feed contract address.
function_v0.name: price_feed

function_v0.doc: Calculates the verification fee for a cross-chain message.\n\nCalled by the send library to quote DVN fees before sending.
function_v0.name: get_fee

function_v0.doc:
Assigns a verification job to this DVN and returns fee payment info.

Called by the send library when a message is sent. The DVN will later
verify the message on the destination chain.
function_v0.name: assign_job

function_v0.doc: Dispatches external contract calls.
function_v0.name: execute_transaction

function_v0.doc: Sets the upgrader contract address. Requires self authorization.
function_v0.name: set_upgrader

function_v0.doc: Returns the current upgrader contract address, if set.
function_v0.name: upgrader

function_v0.doc: Sets destination chain configurations. Requires admin authorization.
function_v0.name: set_dst_config

function_v0.doc: Returns the destination configuration for a specific endpoint ID.
function_v0.name: dst_config

function_v0.doc: Returns the Verifier ID for this DVN.
function_v0.name: vid

function_v0.doc: Computes the hash of call data for multisig signing.\n\nOff-chain signers use this to compute the hash they need to sign.
function_v0.name: hash_call_data

function_v0.doc:
Initializes the DVN contract.

# Arguments
* `vid` - Verifier ID, unique identifier for this DVN
* `signers` - Initial multisig signers (20-byte Ethereum addresses)
* `threshold` - Minimum signatures required for multisig operations
* `admins` - Initial admin addresses for operational functions
* `supported_msglibs` - Message libraries this DVN supports (e.g., ULN302)
* `price_feed` - Price feed contract for fee calculations
* `default_multiplier_bps` - Default fee multiplier (10000 = 1x)
* `worker_fee_lib` - Fee library contract for computing DVN fees
* `deposit_address` - Address to receive fee payments
function_v0.name: __constructor

function_v0.doc:
Sets admin status for an address. Can be called by an existing admin.

This allows existing admins to add or remove other admins without going through
the owner/multisig path.

# Arguments
* `caller` - The admin calling this function (must provide authorization)
* `admin` - The address to set admin status for
* `active` - `true` to add admin, `false` to remove
function_v0.name: set_admin_by_admin

function_v0.doc: Upgrades the contract to new WASM bytecode.
function_v0.name: upgrade

function_v0.doc: Runs migration logic after an upgrade.
function_v0.name: migrate

function_v0.doc: Adds or removes a signer from the multisig. Requires owner authorization.
function_v0.name: set_signer

function_v0.doc: Sets the signature threshold (quorum). Requires owner authorization.
function_v0.name: set_threshold

function_v0.doc: Returns all registered signers.
function_v0.name: get_signers

function_v0.doc: Returns the total number of registered signers.
function_v0.name: total_signers

function_v0.doc: Checks if an address is a registered signer.
function_v0.name: is_signer

function_v0.doc: Returns the current signature threshold (quorum).
function_v0.name: threshold

function_v0.doc: Verifies signatures against the configured threshold.
function_v0.name: verify_signatures

function_v0.doc: Verifies signatures against a custom threshold.
function_v0.name: verify_n_signatures

function_v0.doc:
Extends the instance TTL.

# Arguments

* `threshold` - The threshold to extend the TTL (if current TTL is below this, extend).
* `extend_to` - The TTL to extend to.
function_v0.name: extend_instance_ttl

function_v0.doc:
Sets TTL configs for instance and persistent storage.

- `None` values remove the corresponding config (disables auto-extension for that type)
- Validates that `threshold <= extend_to <= MAX_TTL`

# Arguments
- `instance` - TTL config for instance storage
- `persistent` - TTL config for persistent storage

# Panics
- `TtlConfigFrozen` if configs are frozen
- `InvalidTtlConfig` if validation fails
function_v0.name: set_ttl_configs

function_v0.doc: Returns the current TTL configs as (instance_config, persistent_config).
function_v0.name: ttl_configs

function_v0.doc:
Permanently freezes TTL configs, preventing any future modifications.

This is irreversible and provides immutability guarantees to users.
Emits `TtlConfigsFrozen` event.

# Panics
- `TtlConfigAlreadyFrozen` if already frozen
function_v0.name: freeze_ttl_configs

function_v0.doc: Returns whether TTL configs are frozen.
function_v0.name: is_ttl_configs_frozen

cases.doc: Library is already registered with the endpoint
cases.name: AlreadyRegistered

cases.doc: Compose message already exists for this GUID and index
cases.name: ComposeExists

cases.doc: Compose message not found for the given GUID and index
cases.name: ComposeNotFound

cases.doc: Default receive library is not set for the source endpoint
cases.name: DefaultReceiveLibUnavailable

cases.doc: Default send library is not set for the destination endpoint
cases.name: DefaultSendLibUnavailable

cases.doc: Supplied native token fee is less than required
cases.name: InsufficientNativeFee

cases.doc: Supplied ZRO token fee is less than required
cases.name: InsufficientZroFee

cases.doc: Timeout expiry is invalid (already expired)
cases.name: InvalidExpiry

cases.doc: Amount is invalid (negative)
cases.name: InvalidAmount

cases.doc: Compose index exceeds maximum allowed value
cases.name: InvalidIndex

cases.doc: Nonce is invalid for the requested operation
cases.name: InvalidNonce

cases.doc: Payload hash is invalid (empty hash not allowed)
cases.name: InvalidPayloadHash

cases.doc: Receive library is not valid for the receiver and source endpoint
cases.name: InvalidReceiveLibrary

cases.doc: Operation requires a non-default (custom) library
cases.name: OnlyNonDefaultLib

cases.doc: Library must support receiving messages
cases.name: OnlyReceiveLib

cases.doc: Library must be registered with the endpoint
cases.name: OnlyRegisteredLib

cases.doc: Library must support sending messages
cases.name: OnlySendLib

cases.doc: Messaging path cannot be initialized for the given origin
cases.name: PathNotInitializable

cases.doc: Message cannot be verified for the given origin
cases.name: PathNotVerifiable

cases.doc: Payload hash does not match the stored hash
cases.name: PayloadHashNotFound

cases.doc: New value is the same as existing value
cases.name: SameValue

cases.doc: Caller is not authorized (not OApp or delegate)
cases.name: Unauthorized

cases.doc: Endpoint ID is not supported by the library
cases.name: UnsupportedEid

cases.doc: ZRO fee must be greater than zero when pay_in_zro is true
cases.name: ZeroZroFee

cases.doc: ZRO token address is not set
cases.name: ZroUnavailable

udt_struct_v0.doc: Parameters for sending a cross-chain message.

fields.doc: Receiver address on the destination chain (32 bytes).
fields.name: receiver

udt_struct_v0.doc: Source message information identifying where a cross-chain message came from.
udt_struct_v0.name: Origin

fields.doc: Nonce for this pathway.
fields.name: nonce

fields.doc: Sender address on the source chain (32 bytes).
fields.name: sender

fields.doc: Source endpoint ID (chain identifier).
fields.name: src_eid

fields.doc: The outbound nonce for this pathway.
fields.name: nonce

udt_union_v0.name: MessageLibType

void_v0.doc: Supports both sending and receiving messages.
void_v0.name: SendAndReceive

udt_struct_v0.doc:
Version information for a message library.

Note: `minor` and `endpoint_version` use `u32` instead of `u8` because Stellar does not
support `u8` types in contract interface functions.
udt_struct_v0.name: MessageLibVersion

fields.doc: Endpoint version (should not exceed u8::MAX = 255).
fields.name: endpoint_version

fields.doc: Major version number.
fields.name: major

fields.doc: Minor version number (should not exceed u8::MAX = 255).
fields.name: minor

udt_struct_v0.doc: Timeout configuration for receive library transitions.
udt_struct_v0.name: Timeout

fields.doc: Unix timestamp in seconds when the timeout expires.
fields.name: expiry

fields.doc: The old library address that remains valid during the grace period.
fields.name: lib

udt_struct_v0.doc: Parameters for setting message library configuration.
udt_struct_v0.name: SetConfigParam

fields.doc: XDR-encoded configuration data.
fields.name: config

fields.doc: The type of configuration (e.g., executor, ULN).
fields.name: config_type

fields.doc: The endpoint ID this config applies to.
fields.name: eid

udt_struct_v0.doc: Resolved library information with default status.
udt_struct_v0.name: ResolvedLibrary

fields.doc: Whether this is the default library (true) or OApp-specific (false).
fields.name: is_default

fields.doc: The resolved library address.
fields.name: lib

udt_struct_v0.doc: Outbound packet containing all information for cross-chain transmission.
udt_struct_v0.name: OutboundPacket

fields.doc: Destination endpoint ID.

fields.doc: Globally unique identifier for this message.
fields.name: guid

fields.doc: The message payload.
fields.name: message

fields.doc: Outbound nonce for this pathway.
fields.name: nonce

fields.doc: Receiver address on destination chain (32 bytes).
fields.name: receiver

fields.doc: Sender address on source chain.
fields.name: sender

fields.doc: Source endpoint ID.
fields.name: src_eid

udt_struct_v0.doc: A fee recipient with the amount to be paid.
udt_struct_v0.name: FeeRecipient

fields.doc: Amount of fee to pay.
fields.name: amount

fields.doc: The address to send the fee to.
fields.name: to

udt_struct_v0.doc: Result of send operation containing fees and encoded packet.
udt_struct_v0.name: FeesAndPacket

fields.doc: The encoded packet ready for transmission.
fields.name: encoded_packet

fields.doc: List of native token fee recipients (executor, DVNs, treasury).
fields.name: native_fee_recipients

fields.doc: List of ZRO token fee recipients (treasury).
fields.name: zro_fee_recipients

udt_struct_v0.doc:
Parameters for DVN fee calculation.

Contains all inputs needed by the fee library to calculate verification fees
for cross-chain messages. Includes message parameters, common configuration,
and destination-specific settings.
udt_struct_v0.name: DvnFeeParams

fields.doc: Number of block confirmations required.
fields.name: confirmations

fields.doc: Default fee multiplier in basis points (used if no dst-specific multiplier).
fields.name: default_multiplier_bps

fields.doc: Destination endpoint ID (chain identifier).
fields.name: dst_eid

fields.doc: Minimum fee margin in USD (scaled).
fields.name: floor_margin_usd

fields.doc: Destination-specific fee multiplier in basis points (0 = use default).
fields.name: multiplier_bps

fields.doc: DVN options
fields.name: options

fields.doc: Number of required signatures (quorum).
fields.name: quorum

udt_struct_v0.doc:
Parameters for executor fee calculation.

Contains all inputs needed by the fee library to calculate execution fees
for cross-chain messages. Includes message parameters, common configuration,
and destination-specific settings.
udt_struct_v0.name: FeeParams

fields.doc: Size of the message calldata in bytes.
fields.name: calldata_size

fields.doc: Default fee multiplier in basis points (used if no dst-specific multiplier).
fields.name: default_multiplier_bps

fields.doc: Destination endpoint ID (chain identifier).
fields.name: dst_eid

fields.doc: Minimum fee margin in USD (scaled).
fields.name: floor_margin_usd

fields.doc: Base gas for each lzCompose call on destination chain.
fields.name: lz_compose_base_gas

fields.doc: Destination-specific fee multiplier in basis points (0 = use default).
fields.name: multiplier_bps

fields.doc: Maximum native token value that can be sent.
fields.name: native_cap

fields.doc: Encoded executor options (lzReceive gas, lzCompose, nativeDrop, etc.).
fields.name: options

udt_struct_v0.doc: Gas price information for a destination endpoint.\n\nContains the exchange rate and gas costs needed for cross-chain fee calculations.
udt_struct_v0.name: Price

fields.doc: Gas cost per byte of calldata on the destination chain.
fields.name: gas_per_byte

fields.doc: Gas price in the smallest unit (wei for EVM, stroops for Stellar).
fields.name: gas_price_in_unit

fields.doc: Price ratio = (remote native token price / local native token price) * PRICE_RATIO_DENOMINATOR.\nUsed to convert destination chain gas costs to source chain native token.
fields.name: price_ratio

udt_struct_v0.doc: Fee estimation result with detailed breakdown.\n\nContains the calculated fee and all intermediate values used in the calculation.
udt_struct_v0.name: FeeEstimate

fields.doc: Source chain native token price in USD (scaled).
fields.name: native_price_usd

fields.doc: Price ratio used for the calculation.
fields.name: price_ratio

fields.doc: Denominator for the price ratio (typically 10^20).
fields.name: price_ratio_denominator

fields.doc: Total gas fee in source chain native token units.
fields.name: total_gas_fee
